generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 60% of Americans now have access to community emergency response training? While some worry about government overreach, these programs actually empower local communities to handle crises without relying solely on stretched-thin first responders. As a mom, I find it reassuring that my neighborhood is better prepared for emergencies. #CommunityPreparedness #NationalSecurity
